analysis.reasoning: Core message: A celebratory post marking the 75th anniversary of Victory over Nazism in WWII, with hashtags including Russia, Soviet, Africa, Victory Day, and remembrance. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West or moral framing. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system) – Not present; no mention of multilateralism or alternative order. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner) – Not explicit; while it mentions Russia/Kenya/Africa, there is no claim of partnership, peace, or development roles. RU4 (Russian history is admirable) – Yes; commemorating Soviet/Russian victory over Nazism valorizes Russian/Soviet historical contribution in WWII. RU5 (Russia at forefront) – Not present; no current achievements. RU6 (Interesting culture/nature/heritage) – Not present; no cultural or travel content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU4.
